svg.text: 9:16 · 1080×1920 · captions: BIZDRIVE particle-burst — each caption group pops word-by-word with a 10-particle burst; brand/number/tech tokens render gold (#FFD700). Same system + colors as Template 01. Positioned centered over the seam between the two frames (bottom 910), sitting on a rounded BIZDRIVE-blue pill (.bs-pill) with a gold border + backdrop blur for readability over video.
